body.title: Igor NE loops on blockage question instead of acting on standing goals
body.result: Suppressed NE cognitive blockage gap loop when AGED_INTENT standing goals present: NE prompt guidance + _process_gaps() filter + flag_top_gap() defense layer in narrative_engine.py and learner.py
body.intention: I intend that Igor acts on standing goals when idle rather than looping on a self-generated blockage question.
body.description:
When standing goals (READ_CODEBASE, READ_QUEUE, READ_WEB, ASK_AKIEN_QUESTIONS, BUILD_QUESTION_LIST) are present in TWM at moderate salience, the NE should pick one and act. Instead it generates NARRATIVE_GAP observations asking 'What specific factors are contributing to the cognitive blockage?' at salience=0.98-1.00 and broadcasts them to the shared channel, looping indefinitely without executing any action.

Standing goals are intentional — Igor is supposed to read, ask questions, and build context when idle. The NE treating them as a blockage signal rather than an action queue is the bug.

Likely cause: NARRATIVE_GAP lever fires when the NE can't resolve an action from the TWM context, generating a question as a meta-response. That question then becomes the highest-salience item, crowding out the standing goals. The blockage question is self-reinforcing.

Affected files: devices/igor/cognition/ (NE lever logic, narrative_gap handler), devices/igor/brainstem/ (standing goal dispatch)
**Design rules:** NE must produce an action or stay silent — generating a meta-question that loops is a liveness failure
**Scope boundary:** Fix NE to act on standing goals when nothing urgent is present; suppress NARRATIVE_GAP when the only gap is 'no urgent work'
**Completion criteria:** When only standing goals are in TWM (no urgent chat, no high-priority impulses), Igor picks one and executes it rather than looping on a blockage question; shared channel shows reads/actions not repeated meta-questions

**HIGH-INERTIA APPROVAL (2026-06-05):** Akien approved changes to narrative_engine.py and learner.py via re-issuing /sprint-ticket command. Changes: (1) NE prompt guidance for AGED_INTENT handling, (2) _process_gaps() blockage suppression filter, (3) flag_top_gap() defense layer.
